summary: Align packaged MCP listener validation with the authenticated endpoint manifest produced by the real desktop relay.

decisions.decision: Accept either the exact three-field loopback identity or a fully validated six-field authenticated manifest as the expected MCP endpoint, reduce a valid manifest to its address/port/PID identity, and continue requiring one exact observed listener row.
decisions.rationale: The production walkthrough passes the already validated authenticated manifest, while the original helper test passed only its three-field identity. Reapplying the exact three-key identity predicate directly to the six-field manifest made every genuine listener fail. Validating the full manifest before reduction preserves token, process-identity, shape, and loopback guarantees without weakening the observed listener match.

testEvidence.criterion: A genuine listener observation must match the real authenticated manifest and malformed manifests must still fail closed.
testEvidence.test: Run the packaged evidence helper suite with a six-field expected-manifest regression.

red.command: Windows Sandbox packaged walkthrough for a8d3b34f6701aaf24ff5c81f71a9a8d256136611; pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/packaged-desktop-evidence.test.ts
red.outcome: RED: the real package rendered the cube, exported and parsed a 12-triangle binary STL, created its authenticated MCP manifest, then timed out because the listener validator rejected the six-field manifest. The focused regression failed 1/32 at the same validator.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/packaged-desktop-evidence.test.ts; pnpm.cmd exec biome check scripts/lib/packaged-desktop-evidence.mjs tests/scripts/packaged-desktop-evidence.test.ts; node --check scripts/lib/packaged-desktop-evidence.mjs; git diff --check
green.outcome: GREEN: 32/32 focused tests passed; formatting/static syntax/diff checks passed. The authenticated manifest now reduces only after full validation, while malformed manifests, wrong listeners, duplicate listeners, and off-state listeners remain rejected.

nearMisses.sought: Why a real listener could never satisfy the packaged evidence helper
nearMisses.confirmation: The helper required Object.keys(address,pid,port) on the expected value even though the runner passed the validated address/pid/port/process_start_id/token/version manifest.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
